audit_policy.cost_note: New York State residents aged 60+ may audit undergraduate courses at CUNY community colleges on a space-available basis with tuition waived under N.Y. Education Law § 6304(5). Standard tuition applies to all other audit students, and regular fees may still apply.

senior_discount.notes: N.Y. Education Law § 6304(5) allows NYS residents aged 60+ to audit undergraduate courses at CUNY community colleges tuition-free on a space-available basis. Audited courses do not count toward a degree.

steps: Complete a non-degree application
Contact the Registrar about the Senior Citizen Audit Program
Register after matriculated students during the late-registration window
application_process.timing: Register during the late-registration window (after matriculated students)

restrictions: Audit registration typically opens after matriculated students register
Audited courses do not count for degree credit
Financial aid does not cover audited courses
Regular student fees may still apply
